message:
feat(ux): add helpful error messages with did-you-mean suggestions (xf-15)

Implement premium-quality error messaging:

- Add structured error format with ✗ prefix, explanation, and actionable hints
- Implement Levenshtein distance algorithm for typo detection
- Add "did you mean?" suggestions for unknown fields and config keys
- Transform cold errors into helpful guidance:
  - "Archive not found" → explains how to download X data
  - "No indexed archive yet" → step-by-step quick start
  - "Conflicting options" → explains what each flag does
  - Unknown values → suggests closest match + valid options

Error format:
  ✗ Title

     Explanation of what went wrong

     Try:
       • First suggestion
       • Second suggestion

Files changed:
- src/error.rs: Add format_error(), levenshtein_distance(), find_closest_match()
- src/main.rs: Update all major error messages to use new format
- src/lib.rs: Export new error formatting utilities
- tests/cli_e2e.rs: Update test assertions for new error messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
